channel.title: GitHub Vue Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: CorentinTh/it-tools
item.description: Collection of handy online tools for developers, with great UX.

item.title: dreamhunter2333/cloudflare_temp_email
item.description: CloudFlare free temp domain email 免费收发 临时域名邮箱 支持附件 IMAP SMTP TelegramBot

item.title: hslr-s/sun-panel
item.description: A server, NAS navigation panel, Homepage, browser homepage. | 一个服务器、NAS导航面板、Homepage、浏览器首页。

item.title: yangzongzhuan/RuoYi-Vue3
item.description: 🎉 (RuoYi)官方仓库 基于SpringBoot，Spring Security，JWT，Vue3 & Vite、Element Plus 的前后端分离权限管理系统

item.title: pulsejet/memories
item.description: Fast, modern and advanced photo management suite. Runs as a Nextcloud app.

item.title: serversideup/financial-freedom
item.description: 🔥🔥🔥 An open source alternative to Mint, YNAB, and more. Stay on budget and build wealth without sacrificing your privacy.

item.title: frappe/builder
item.description: Craft beautiful websites effortlessly with an intuitive visual builder and publish them instantly

item.title: unovue/radix-vue
item.description: Vue port of Radix UI Primitives. An open-source UI component library for building high-quality, accessible design systems and web apps.

item.title: alireza0/s-ui
item.description: An advanced Web Panel • Built for SagerNet/Sing-Box

item.title: epicmaxco/vuestic-admin
item.description: Vuestic Admin is an open-source, ready-to-use admin template suite designed for rapid development, easy maintenance, and high accessibility. Built on Vuestic UI, Vue 3, Vite, Pinia, and Tailwind CSS. Maintained by Epicmax (@epicmaxco).

item.title: Lissy93/dashy
item.description: 🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!

item.title: nutui-uniapp/nutui-uniapp
item.description: 京东风格的轻量级移动端组件库，基于 uniapp与Vue3，支持移动端 H5 和 小程序开发

item.title: mainsail-crew/mainsail
item.description: Mainsail is the popular web interface for managing and controlling 3D printers with Klipper.

item.title: zyronon/douyin
item.description: Vue3 + Pinia 仿抖音，Vue 在移动端的最佳实践 . Imitate TikTok ，Vue Best practices on Mobile
